title: Relics Of Gaming Continued
description: Relics Of Gaming add famous weapons from games compatible with Epic Fight and Better Combat
body:
An continuation of [Relics Of Gaming](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/relics-of-gaming) mod that add famous weapons from games compatible with [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

featuring high quality 3D models and some weapons have special abilities, for the emissive textures to work you'll need optfine

<details>
<summary>Genshin Weapons Abilities</summary>

| Name                | Ability             
|---------------------|---------------------
| Harbinger Of Dawn   | When health above 90% add strenght effect.             
| Debate Club         | Attacks has 50% of dealing an additional 60% DMG.              
| Halberd             | 30% chance of dealing additional damage.           
| Fillet Blade        | On hit,has 40% chance to deal 140% ATK DMG to a single enemy.   
| Ferrous Shadow      | When HP falls below 70%,increases Attack DMG by 30%.   
| The Black Sword     | Increases DMG dealt by Attacks by 20%. Additionally,regenerates health when scores a CRIT Hit.    
| White Iron Greatsword | Defeating an opponent restores HP. 
| White Tassel        | Increases Attack DMG by 24%.   
| Skyrider Greatsword | Attacks increase ATK by 60% for 8s. Max 4 stacks.   
| Whiteblind          | Attacks increase ATK and DEF by 60% for 8s. Max 4 stacks.    
| The Bell            | When health is below 50% set resistance effect. When under resistance effect set strenght effect.    
| The Flute           | Normal or Charged Attacks grant a Harmonic on hits. Gaining 5 Harmonics triggers the power of music and deals 100% ATK DMG to surrounding enemies.    
| Prototype Archaic   | On hit,Normal or Charged Attacks have a 50% chance to deal an additional DMG to opponents within a small AoE.   
| Prototype Starglitter | Attacks increase ATK by 4% for 8s. Max 4 stacks.   
| Prototype Rancour   | Attacks increase ATK by 4% for 8s. Max 4 stacks.   
| Favonius Greatsword | Hits have a 60% chance to generate a small amount of Elemental Particles.    
| Favonius Lance      | Hits have a 60% chance to generate a small amount of Elemental Particles    
| Favonius Sword      | Hits have a 60% chance to generate a small amount of Elemental Particles    
| Dragonspine Spear   | Attacks has a 60% chance of dropping an Everfrost Icicle above them  
| Snow-Tombed Starsilver | Attacks has a 60% chance of dropping an Everfrost Icicle above them 
| Sky Ward Blade      | When in hand add strenght and speed effect. Attacks have a 60% chance to create a vacuum blade  
| Sky Ward Pride      | When in hand add strenght and speed effect. Attacks have a 60% chance to create a vacuum blade   
| Sky Ward Spine      | When in hand add strenght and speed effect. Attacks have a 60% chance to create a vacuum blade   
| Wolf's Gravestone   | When in hand add strenght effect attacks against opponents with less than 30% HP set effect weakness to target and strenght to user 
| The Unforged        | When in hand set effect resistance. Scoring hits on opponents set effect strenght. Max 2 stacks.   
| Vortex Vanquisher   | When in hand set effect resistance. Scoring hits on opponents set effect strenght. Max 2 stacks.  
| Summit Shaper       | When in hand set effect resistance. Scoring hits on opponents set effect strenght. Max 2 stacks.  
| Aquila Favonia      | ATK is increased by 20%. When taking damage regenerate HP  
| Song of Broken Pines | When attacks hit opponents,the character gains a Sigil of Whispers. When you possess four Sigils of Whispers,all of them will be consumed and will have the strenght effect 
| Freedom-Sworn       | When attacks hit opponents,the character gains a Sigil of Rebellion. When you possess two Sigils of Rebellions,all of them will be consumed and will have the strenght effect  
| Primordial Jade Cutter | HP increased by 20%. Additionally,provides an ATK Bonus based on 12% of the wielder's Max HP.  
| Primordial Jade Winged-Spear | On hit,increases ATK by 10% for 8s. Max 7 stacks.While in possession of the maximum possible stacks,DMG dealt is increased by 12%. 
| Staff of Homa       | HP increased by 20%. Additionally,provides an ATK Bonus based on 40% of the wielder's Max HP. When the wielder's HP is less than 50%,set effect strenght.   
| Skyward Harp        | Hits have a 60% chance to inflict a small AoE attack and to create a vacuum blade  
| Amenoma Kageuchi    | When attacks hit opponents, the character gains a Succession Seed. When you possess three Succession Seeds, all of them will be consumed and will have the strenght effect    
| Katsuragi­kiri Nagamasa | When attacks hit opponents, the character gains a Succession Seed. When you possess three Succession Seeds, all of them will be consumed and will have the strenght effect    
| Kitain Cross Spear  | When attacks hit opponents, the character gains a Succession Seed. When you possess three Succession Seeds, all of them will be consumed and will have the strenght effect    
| Hamayumi            | When attacks hit opponents, the character gains a Succession Seed. When you possess three Succession Seeds, all of them will be consumed and will have the strenght effect    
| Akuoumaru           | For every point of the experience, increase the DMG by 0.21%.   
| Wave­breaker's Fin  | For every point of the experience, increase the DMG by 0.21%.    
| Luxurious Sea-Lord  | Attacks has a 50% chance of summoning a huge onrush of tuna that deals 100% ATK DMG.    
| Mistsplitter Reforged | Gain 12% DMG Bonus and receive the might of the Mistsplitter's Emblem. At stack levels 1/2/3, Mistsplitter's Emblem provides a 8/16/28% DMG Bonus.    
| Redhorn Stone­thresher | DEF is increased. Attack DMG is increased by 40% of DEF.   
| Engulfing Lightning | ATK increased by 28% of EXP level.	
| Thundering Pulse    | Increases ATK by 20% and grants the might of the Thunder Emblem. At stack levels 1/2/3, the Thunder Emblem increases Attack DMG by 12/24/40%.

</details>

I couldn't figure out how to add an entity as obj model

<details>
